ddls:
CREATE TABLE "patients" (
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each patient */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the patient */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the patient */,
  "dob" TEXT /* Date of birth of the patient */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the patient */,
  "contact_number" TEXT /* Contact number of the patient */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the patient */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the patient */,
  "blood_group" TEXT /* Blood group of the patient */,
  "medical_insurance_number" TEXT /* Medical insurance number of the patient */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "treatments" (
  "treatment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each treatment */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patient receiving treatment */,
  "treatment_date" TEXT /* Date of treatment administration */,
  "treatment_type" TEXT /* Type of treatment (e.g., Radiation Therapy) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the treatment */,
  "dosage" REAL /* Dosage of the treatment */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the treatment in days */,
  "route_of_administration" TEXT /* Route of administration (e.g., oral, intravenous) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("treatment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_treatments_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "liver_activity" (
  "activity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each liver activity record */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patient associated with this record */,
  "total_counts" TEXT /* Total counts of activity in the liver */,
  "measured_activity" REAL /* Measured activity in MBq */,
  "injected_activity" REAL /* Injected activity in MBq */,
  "difference_percentage" TEXT /* Difference percentage between measured and injected activity */,
  "scan_type" TEXT /* Type of scan performed (e.g., SPECT, PET) */,
  "scanner_model" TEXT /* Model of the scanner used */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("activity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_liver_activity_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "follow_ups" (
  "followup_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each follow-up record */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patient associated with this follow-up */,
  "followup_date" TEXT /* Date of the follow-up appointment */,
  "remarks" TEXT /* Remarks or observations made during the follow-up */,
  "followup_type" TEXT /* Type of follow-up (e.g., in-person, phone call) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("followup_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_follow_ups_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "doctors" (
  "doctor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each doctor */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the doctor */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the doctor */,
  "specialization" TEXT /* Specialization of the doctor (e.g., Hepatologist) */,
  "contact_number" TEXT /* Contact number of the doctor */,
  "hospital_affiliation" TEXT /* Hospital affiliation of the doctor */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("doctor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "doctor_patient_relationships" (
  "relationship_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each relationship record */,
  "doctor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the doctor */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patient */,
  "relationship_type" TEXT /* Type of relationship (e.g., primary care, specialist) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("relationship_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_doctor_patient_relationships_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_doctor_patient_relationships_doctor_id FOREIGN KEY ("doctor_id") REFERENCES doctors ("doctor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "medical_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each medical history record */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patient associated with this history */,
  "condition" TEXT /* Description of liver-related condition */,
  "diagnosis_date" TEXT /* Date of diagnosis */,
  "treatment_history" TEXT /* History of treatments related to the condition */,
  "allergies" TEXT /* List of allergies */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_medical_history_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "admin_users" (
  "admin_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each admin user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for the admin user */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for authentication */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the admin user (e.g., system admin, nurse) */,
  "access_level" TEXT /* Access level of the admin user (e.g., read-only, read-write) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("admin_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "activity_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "admin_id" INTEGER /* ID of the admin user performing the action */,
  "action" TEXT /* Description of the action taken */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the action was performed */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the device used to perform the action */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_activity_logs_admin_id FOREIGN KEY ("admin_id") REFERENCES admin_users ("admin_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patient associated with the notification */,
  "message" TEXT /* Notification message */,
  "date_created" TEXT /* Date and time the notification was created */,
  "notification_type" TEXT /* Type of notification (e.g., appointment reminder, system update) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "lab_results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each lab result record */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patient associated with the lab result */,
  "test_type" TEXT /* Type of lab test performed */,
  "result" TEXT /* Result of the lab test */,
  "test_date" TEXT /* Date when the lab test was conducted */,
  "lab_technician" TEXT /* Name of the lab technician who performed the test */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_lab_results_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "treatment_plans" (
  "plan_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each treatment plan */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patient associated with this plan */,
  "plan_name" TEXT /* Name of the treatment plan */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the treatment plan */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the treatment plan */,
  "plan_status" TEXT /* Status of the treatment plan (e.g., active, completed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("plan_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_treatment_plans_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "medications" (
  "medication_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each medication */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patient associated with this medication */,
  "medication_name" TEXT /* Name of the medication */,
  "dosage" REAL /* Dosage of the medication */,
  "frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of medication administration */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of medication administration */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of medication administration */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("medication_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_medications_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "allergies" (
  "allergy_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each allergy */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patient associated with this allergy */,
  "allergen" TEXT /* Name of the allergen */,
  "reaction" TEXT /* Description of the allergic reaction */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("allergy_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_allergies_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id")
)
